inputs.label: Last Spring Frost Day
inputs.businessContext: Historical average last spring frost date (day of year, 1-365)

inputs.label: Planting Delay after Frost
inputs.businessContext: Recommended safe days after last frost for soil warming

inputs.label: Crop Base Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Minimum temperature for crop growth (growing degree day base)

inputs.label: Target GDD to Maturity
inputs.businessContext: Total growing degree days required from planting to harvest

inputs.label: Expected Daily Average Temp
inputs.businessContext: Forecast average daily air temperature during growing season

inputs.label: Current Soil Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Measured soil temperature at seeding depth

inputs.label: Minimum Soil Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Crop-specific minimum soil temperature for safe germination

inputs.label: Harvest Safety Margin
inputs.businessContext: Additional days to ensure full maturity and weather variability buffer

formulas.daysToMaturity: Math.ceil(targetGDD / Math.max(0.001, Math.max(0, averageDailyTemp - baseTemperature))) + safetyMargin
formulas.estimatedHarvestDay: ((lastFrostDay + plantingDateOffset + Math.ceil(Math.max(0, (minSoilTemp - soilTemp) / 0.3)) + (Math.ceil(targetGDD / Math.max(0.001, Math.max(0, averageDailyTemp - baseTemperature))) + safetyMargin) - 1) % 365 + 1)
formulas.daysToHarvest: Math.ceil(targetGDD / Math.max(0.001, Math.max(0, averageDailyTemp - baseTemperature))) + safetyMargin
